vibe: Clinical-grade calm, restrained, biological instrument with a screen

typography.font_mono: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace

cards.style: bg-[#0F1115] border border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl p-5 sm:p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

signature_baseline_band.description: The athlete's historical normal range shaded behind key values.
signature_baseline_band.chart_implementation: In Recharts, use a secondary Area component or ReferenceArea behind the main Line to represent the historical band. Fill should be #1FA98F at 10-15% opacity.
signature_baseline_band.ui_implementation: For single text values, place a subtle teal gradient or solid teal block (opacity 15%) positioned absolutely behind the metric text, slightly overlapping the number.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1FA98F] text-[#050507] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#3DD1B7] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#16191E] text-white border border-white/[0.06] rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#1E222A] transition-colors

navigation.bottom_tabs: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-[#050507]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/[0.06] pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
navigation.tab_item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-slate-500 hover:text-white transition-colors

charts.dots: discrete test-event points should be filled circles (r=4) with #050507 stroke

Onboarding.elements: Account creation form (name, sport, goal). Apple Health connect button. Calibration messaging block 'Establishing your biological baseline...'

elements: Hero Readiness Score (0-100) using font-mono, with the signature baseline band shaded beneath.
Invie Narrative Block: 2-3 sentences of AI interpretation (Geist font, leading-relaxed).
Compact Signal Cards (HRV, Sleep, Training Load, sIgA) in a 2x2 grid. Each shows value + delta vs baseline + directional arrow.
Footer: 'Stored in France · Yours' in text-xs text-slate-500.
Focus: sIgA value at the top.
Full-width longitudinal line chart with shaded personal baseline band behind the trend line.
Toggle switch to overlay Training Load.
Secondary tabs for Cortisol / Testosterone / Creatinine.

Invie.elements: Chat bubbles. User bubbles: dark elevated gray. Invie bubbles: subtle teal border or transparent with teal accent icon. Input area at bottom.

elements: List of connected sources (Apple Health, Labs Device, Manual).
Sovereignty messaging block highlighting RGPD compliance.

image_urls.description: Green and pink abstract art (microscopic/cellular feel)

icons.style: stroke-[1.5px] to match the clinical, precise aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first web app view simulating React Native. Enforce a mobile container logic (e.g. max-w-md mx-auto) for the root element if deployed to web, or full screen if using pure mobile constraints.
CRITICAL: Use tabular-nums utility class on ALL numeric values. Numbers must not shift when they change.
CRITICAL: The 'Personal Baseline Band' must be visible behind the main Hero Readiness Score and inside all charts.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use the specified dark shades (#050507, #0F1115).
Do NOT use generic fitness app gradients. Keep surfaces flat, matte, and precise. Use 1px borders (border-white/[0.06]) to define structure.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
For charts, use Recharts. Implement the baseline band using ReferenceArea or a secondary Area component.
